subcodes.title: Words to some friends, spoken on 1915-05-23
subcodes.first_line: A Bahá'í must conform all his great and small affairs in accord with the good-pleasure of the Blessed Perfection. This is the unerring criterion.
subcodes.subjects: @the golden rule; regard for one's neighbor; doing unto others, @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @attaining good pleasure of God
